title: Agent frontmatter schema (ADR-09 C2)
description: Frontmatter contract for .claude/agents/*.md. execution_backend is required in strict mode. lenient mode in loader.py drops execution_backend from required for migration scripts.

name.description: Lower-case kebab-case identifier. Matched by Agent tool subagent_type.

description.description: Free text. May include multi-line Examples block.

model.description: Anthropic model alias or version-locked ID (e.g., 'opus', 'sonnet', 'haiku', or 'claude-opus-4-7'). Claude Code validates the value itself.

context.description: Optional. Single value enum today. Schema bump required if Claude Code adds new values.

disallowedTools.description: Optional. Comma-separated PascalCase tool names (e.g., 'Write, Edit').

execution_backend.description: ADR-09: which CLI executes the agent's work. 'claude' = direct Claude session. 'codex' = Codex CLI subprocess dispatch.
